name: ibkr
description: Read-only Interactive Brokers (IBKR) integration for Claude Code and any MCP client: account, positions, snapshot + streaming quotes (MCP resource subscriptions), option chains, daily history, market scans, fixed-fractional position sizing, and a five-indicator risk-regime dashboard (VIX term, HYG/SPY, USD/JPY, SPY dealer zero-gamma, S&P 500 breadth) via the local ibkr CLI.
